accessNotes.en: Piges gia tin paralia Agia Eirini anatolika tis Karystou anaferoun eykoli prosvasi me syntomi katavasi peripou 70-80 m., alla i eisodos apo ton dromo mporei na min einai poly emfanis.
accessNotes.gr: Πηγές για την παραλία Αγία Ειρήνη ανατολικά της Καρύστου αναφέρουν εύκολη πρόσβαση με σύντομη κατάβαση περίπου 70-80 μ., αλλά η είσοδος από τον δρόμο μπορεί να μην είναι πολύ εμφανής.

sourceNotes: Evia local-source pass 2026-05-26: the 37.97969,24.47264 record matches the Karystos-side Agia Eirini beach. Tripadvisor places Paralia Agia Irini about 9-10 km east of Karystos with a short 70-80 m descent; BeachSearcher describes a small fine-pebble beach after Karystos with steep/unclear path access; Windy coordinates match 37.9801,24.4729; Athens Voice lists Agia Eirini among Municipality Karystos beaches. Kept conservative no-services wording.

Evia tourist-priority evidence pass 2026-05-29: Agia Eirini Karystos has multiple live direct/travel sources supporting the Karystos-side beach identity, short walking descent, pebble/rock character and no fixed services. Confidence promoted to high for static identity/access/terrain/service metadata only; coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live sea/wind/calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.
